news.paragraph: Gold is seeing modest gains following reports of surging U.S. wholesale inflation, though rising dollar strength is providing some resistance. Traders should also weigh recent skepticism from a major fund strategist regarding gold's ability to hedge against inflation and monitor potential macro shifts ahead of the US-China meeting.
headlines: Daily ETF Flows: Another $903M Flows Into DRAM
